seo.title: Luis Arteaga | Full-Stack Web Developer (React & Next.js, Spring Boot)
seo.description: Portfolio of Luis Arteaga. Developing modern, fast, and accessible web applications that solve real problems and generate business value.

hero.subtitle: Specialized in scalable architectures, microfrontends, and high-performance solutions that transform business vision into impactful technological products.

about.title: Career and Strategic Approach
about.intro: I am an Electronic Engineer and Frontend Developer with experience building scalable applications in corporate environments. My focus goes beyond implementing interfaces — I aim to understand the full architecture, make sound technical decisions, and ensure every solution remains maintainable over time. I work with React and TypeScript in microfrontend-based architectures, applying best practices, automated testing, and CI/CD processes. My background in IoT and backend development allows me to approach products with a holistic perspective, from service integration to the final user experience.

skills.frontend: Microfrontends Architecture: Designing modular and decoupled systems under large-scale standards.
skills.typescript: Type Engineering: Implementation of robust data contracts and strict validations with Zod.
skills.backend: Distributed Ecosystems: Development of resilient services with Spring Boot and Node.js for high availability.
skills.database: Persistence Strategies: Advanced data modeling in relational (MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB) environments.
skills.devops: Continuous Delivery Culture: Automation of software life cycles with Jenkins and enterprise quality assurance.
skills.testing: Software Assurance: Unit and integration testing oriented towards proactive prevention with Vitest.
skills.uiux: Design Systems: Building highly reusable atomic components with Tailwind CSS.
skills.ai: AI & Automation: Integration of advanced language models for process optimization and intelligent UX.

experience.title: Trajectory & Impact
experience.subtitle: Technical leadership and strategic execution in corporate and innovation environments.

nttData.description: Leading the modernization of enterprise platforms through microfrontends architectures and banking-level code quality.

achievements.1: Architected and implemented the transition to microfrontends with React, improving team autonomy by 50%.
achievements.2: Established quality standards using Jenkins, SonarQube, and Fortify, reducing vulnerabilities by 80%.
achievements.3: Optimized critical performance through code splitting and advanced caching strategies with Next.js.

nttData.technologies: React, TypeScript, Redux, Microfrontends, Jenkins, Vitest

solusat.description: Comprehensive design of telemetry and industrial control solutions, bridging custom hardware with real-time control interfaces.

achievements.1: Developed real-time monitoring systems using Node.js and MQTT protocol for asset management.
achievements.2: Designed and programmed embedded hardware in C++ and Java, integrating it with dynamic web dashboards.
achievements.3: Implemented automatic workflows reducing operational response time by 40%.

solusat.technologies: Node.js, MQTT, C++, Java, JavaScript, Embedded Systems

freelance.description: Provided end-to-end technical support for IT infrastructure, ensuring system stability, security, and operational continuity.

achievements.1: Installed, configured, and maintained critical hardware and software systems to ensure operational reliability.
achievements.2: Diagnosed and resolved technical incidents, minimizing downtime across devices and systems.
achievements.3: Performed electrical safety testing on equipment, ensuring compliance with technical standards.
achievements.4: Supported the software development team with web layout implementation and maintenance using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

freelance.technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Hardware Support, Technical Diagnostics

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: Real applications and portals addressing market challenges.

project1.title: Habeas Data - Severance Pay
project1.problem: Channel saturation due to manual capture of legal data processing consents.
project1.impact: Automation of the regulatory flow under legal standards, reducing operational load by 60%.

project2.title: Habeas Data - Voluntary Pensions
project2.problem: Need to parameterize specific legal consents according to the savings product.
project2.impact: Implementation of dynamic logic for multiple products using a shared technical core.

project3.title: Eligibility Validation - Severance Pay
project3.problem: Friction in the initial affiliation process and lack of user autonomy.
project3.impact: 100% digitization of the entry flow, allowing for eligibility validation in under a minute.

project4.title: Mandatory Pension Affiliation
project4.problem: Low conversion in transfer processes and failure to communicate additional benefits.
project4.technologies: React, Spring Boot, GitHub Actions, Jest
project4.impact: Conversion funnel optimization with electronic signature and corporate benefits integration.
